original_image_tags: Back of a document page, appearing to be a file folder or backing sheet. The paper is light pink or salmon-colored with a slightly textured, fibrous appearance. The sheet is blank for the most part, with only faint, reversed text visible at the bottom, suggesting bleed-through or an imprint from another document. There are two black hole-punch circles near the top edge, one left-center and one right-center. The top right corner of the sheet is torn and missing.

elements.description: Faint, reversed blue ink stamp at the bottom containing partially legible text including 'RECEIVED', 'MAR 1 21 36', '1949', 'U S A F', and 'Air Transport Service'. Two black punch holes at the top edge. One short black line drawn near the top center and another near the bottom center.

judge.reason: Description B reads specific verbatim text ('RECEIVED', 'MAR 1 21 36', '1949', 'U S A F', 'Air Transport Service') from a stamp that Description A describes as blank with only 'faint, reversed text', creating a direct contradiction on the legibility and content of a specific visual element.
